{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322011955C8651A461EE13D58EFFE"}"},"total":1},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7522128829790552856","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"有点烧脑，好看，充满想象力"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1751385743,"group_id":"7138832423478889505","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N8wurpr8oka185TUi+jEuHh1oQypcc0bd7nMamGMOj8V","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"3021933374604880","user_name":"琅琊山的田中惠"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3021933374604880","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7138832423478889505","book_info":{"abstract":"青铜壶里的酒液映着天火，将流浪大师皱纹里的三千年风霜都酿成了琥珀色。他蹲在雷泽岸边，看自己倒影与龙首人身的雷神重叠又分开。

"先天神魔的骨头，泡酒最好。"大师敲了敲腰间炼妖壶，壶身饕餮纹突然睁开第三只眼，"上次共工撞山时，我存了截椎骨..."

话音未落，整片水域突然倒悬。无数银鱼保持着游动的姿态凝固在空中，水面变成映照星空的镜子。有个披发跣足的身影从银河里走出来，每一步都让星辰泛起涟漪。

"青莲。"那人开口时吐出混沌初开的风暴，"你躲在这具皮囊里太久了。"

大师袖中滑落九枚玉琮，排列成九宫格挡在身前。最古老的那块红山玉琮上，还沾着当年女娲捏土造人时的泥渍。

"我忘了。"他仰头饮尽壶中酒，"但壶记得。"

炼妖壶突然暴涨万丈，壶口飞出七道锁链——那是用北斗七星炼化的捆仙索。星空人影冷笑间，整片雷泽的水腾空而起，化作百万水箭...","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o6febb5ffeaa5da44c05033bfd9aefb35~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"干背洋芋丝","author_id":"","book_id":"7138832423478889505","book_name":"流浪在山海经","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#182028","creation_status":"4","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":258,"name":"传统玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=258&name=传统玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":828,"name":"基建","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=828&name=基建&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":875,"name":"山海经","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=875&name=山海经&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7518038415116354110","read_count":"0","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"153018"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"38","tags":"传统玄幻,基建,山海经","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2o6febb5ffeaa5da44c05033bfd9aefb35~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779297596&x-signature=FUKTNHrP28B25Edh%2FMD5RZtgsFw%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"101727925487","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"22"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322011955C8651A461EE13D58EFFE"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读3小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":5528,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":9687,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":0},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4}],"extra":{"book_info":{"abstract":"","audio_thumb_uri":"","author":"","author_id":"","book_id":"7138832423478889505","book_name":"","book_type":"","color_dominate":"","creation_status":"","genre":"","genre_type":"","score":"","serial_count":"","tags":"","thumb_url":"","tomato_book_status":""},"filter_tag":[],"hot_word_search":[],"score_cnt":1,"score_text":"1人点评"}},"debug_info":"","log_id":"20260322011955C8651A461EE13D58EFFE","message":"请求成功"}
